_about: Machine-readable index of references/*.md for agent/human navigation. 'lines' is an indicative snapshot. CI (the hygiene job) asserts this list's file set matches the actual references/ directory, so a renamed/added reference cannot silently desync. Generated; edit references, then regenerate.
